Marco Silva will demand a response from his team after a timid FA Cup exit against Crystal Palace. Arsenal dream XI with Gyokeres and Cunha after Berta summer transfers
arts.sum: The wider squad will likely need additions as well given those who could also leave, but as for Arteta's strongest XI on paper, it is this trio of positions Arsenal will be after the most. Arsenal dream XI after transfers: Raya; White, Saliba, Gabriel, Lewis-Skelly; Odegaard, Zubimendi, Rice; Saka, Gyokeres, Martinelli.

arts.ttl: I had to leave Arsenal to be happy - now I'm out to prove a point with Fulham
arts.sum: Arsenal academy graduate Emile Smith Rowe will return to Emirates Stadium tonight for the first time since joining Fulham on a permanent transfer. However, with just under 2,000 minutes played this season, it is clear to see he has at least achieved his initial aim when it came to deciding to leave Arsenal.

arts.ttl: ‘Out for 6 weeks’ – Bad news for Arsenal man as season looks over
arts.sum: Arsenal goalkeeper Karl Hein has been on loan at Real Valladolid since last summer. The Estonia international started every league fixture until March’s international break. Hein picked up an injury in a World Cup qualifier against Israel last month.
